title: Hamamönü & Historical Fortifications Tapestry
description: Spend a themed day in Ankara: explore the restored Historical Ankara Houses in Hamamönü, visit Ankara Castle, Rahmi M. Koç Museum in Ankara, and Neşe Çay House.
notes: Look out over old Ankara from the walls.
Take a nostalgic tour of Çengelhan.
Take a break in a courtyard mansion with a cup of tea.
Free public restrooms near the square.
